page.title: Configure Bipper
page.description: Meshtastic and Gaulix pager settings for the Seeed Wio Tracker L1 Pro.
page.notBipperWarning: The connected device does not appear to be a Bipper L1 — Gaulix settings may not apply.
page.saveHint: The Identity tab uses the Save button at the top. T1–T4 tag values are applied immediately.

gaulix.title: Gaulix pager
gaulix.description: T1–T4 = up to 4 membership entities. Alerts: `#alerte text #SDIS42 #test` (OR across tags).
gaulix.usbHint: Firmware v1.10+: `#alerte blabla #SDIS42 #test` / `#secours …` / `#info …`. No #entity tag → all bippers.
gaulix.notConnected: Connect a Bipper via USB or Bluetooth to configure the Gaulix pager.

status.title: Pager status
status.empty: Click Refresh to query the pager (#status).

tag.title: Entity membership (T1–T4)
tag.description: Up to 4 entities per Bipper (e.g. T1=SDIS42, T2=DEPT42, T3=Test, T4=UDIOM42). Leave empty to leave a slot unused.
tag.hint: Example: `#alerte fire #SDIS42 #test` → buzzes if this bip belongs to SDIS42 or test. `#info message #test` = 3 beeps, no full-screen.

beep.title: Beep count (legacy)
beep.description: Stored in NVS (#b N). Alert sound remains continuous pim-pom.
beep.label: Count (0 = continuous)

notConnected.title: Not connected
notConnected.description: No active node to send pager commands.
